title: SourceInput
description: Merged configuration schema with all source types and common definitions

x-asset-metadata.description: Declares the metadata each source attaches to every asset kind it produces, composed from reusable contentTypes. Single source of truth for docs rendering and CLI conformance (apps/cli/src/sources/asset_metadata.py).

file.description: Base metadata for any downloaded file or object

size_bytes.description: Raw byte size of the content

spreadsheet.description: Tabular file metadata (csv, tsv, xlsx, parquet)

columns.description: Columns as {name, type} objects (type may be empty for csv/xlsx)

json_root_type.description: Root JSON type: object, array, or scalar

top_level_keys.description: Number of top-level keys when the root is an object

array_length.description: Length when the root is an array

attachment.description: Attachment file basics (no byte download at discovery)

source_hash.description: Hash of the parent object asset

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent

object_key.description: File path relative to the scanned folder

etag.description: Change signature derived from file size and modification time

etag.description: Change signature derived from file size and modification time

source_hash.description: Hash of the parent file asset (embedded images only)

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent (embedded images only)

object_key.description: File path relative to the scanned folder

etag.description: Change signature derived from file size and modification time

object_key.description: File path relative to the scanned folder

etag.description: Change signature derived from file size and modification time

source_hash.description: Hash of the parent object asset

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent

lineage.description: Lineage extraction settings and time window

document_count.description: Estimated number of documents in the collection

node_count.description: Number of nodes with this label

sample_property_keys.description: Sampled property keys present on nodes with this label

links_count.description: Number of linked or related assets

referenced_by.description: Hash of the referencing post asset

links_count.description: Number of linked or related assets

page_hash.description: Hash of the parent page asset

referenced_by.description: Hash of the referencing page asset

links_count.description: Number of linked or related assets

issue_hash.description: Hash of the parent issue asset

links_count.description: Number of linked or related assets

request_hash.description: Hash of the parent request asset

links_count.description: Number of linked or related assets

columns.description: Columns as {name, type} objects (Notion property name and type)

selector.description: Selector for the file within the page

is_external.description: Whether the file is externally hosted

folder.description: Mailbox folder the message was fetched from

sender_domain.description: Domain parsed from the From address

has_html.description: Whether the message has an HTML body part

attachment_count.description: Number of attachments on the message

parent_email_hash.description: Hash of the parent email asset

is_inline.description: Whether the attachment is inline (e.g. embedded image)

channel_id.description: Channel id the video belongs to

upload_date.description: Upload date (YYYYMMDD as reported by yt-dlp)

transcript_available.description: Whether a transcript/caption track was fetched

transcript_source.description: Origin of the transcript text: 'captions' (caption track) or 'whisper' (audio transcribed with faster-whisper)

transcript_language.description: Language code of the fetched transcript

transcript_is_generated.description: Whether the transcript is auto-generated (vs creator-uploaded)

history_length.description: Number of commits in the table history

num_files.description: Number of data files in the current snapshot

earliest_offset.description: Sum of earliest offsets across partitions

latest_offset.description: Sum of latest offsets across partitions

doc_count.description: Number of documents in the index
Number of documents in the index
Number of documents in the index

is_indexing.description: Whether the index has an indexing operation in progress

etag.description: Graph API eTag for the item

modified_by.description: User who last modified the file

permissions.description: Sharing permissions on the item: list of {role, grantee_type, grantee} entries (requires include_permissions)

source_hash.description: Hash of the parent file asset

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent

drive_name.description: Shared drive or 'My Drive' display name

item_path.description: Best-effort path within the drive (folder names joined by '/')

md5_checksum.description: Drive-reported MD5 checksum of the file content (binary files only)

owner.description: Display name or email of the file owner

permissions.description: Sharing permissions on the item: list of {role, grantee_type, grantee} entries (requires include_permissions)

google_mime_type.description: Original Drive mimeType for Google-native files (e.g. application/vnd.google-apps.document)

exported_as.description: Export MIME type used to download a Google-native file, if applicable

source_hash.description: Hash of the parent file asset

location.description: Location of the embedded image within the parent

drive_id.description: Google Drive ID (shared drive ID, or a synthetic ID for My Drive)

AssetType.description: Type of the asset or source

DetectorType.description: Type of detector for content analysis

SamplingStrategy.description: Sampling strategy. AUTOMATIC (recommended default) incrementally ingests a new slice of not-yet-seen data on every run, remembering its position between runs and wrapping around to re-scan from the start once everything has been covered — eventually ingesting everything at a bounded cost per run. RANDOM samples items randomly. LATEST prioritises the most recently modified/created items. ALL scans every item with no limit.

SamplingConfig.title: SamplingConfig
SamplingConfig.description: Controls how content is extracted from each source. For tabular sources rows_per_page controls both sample size for AUTOMATIC/RANDOM/LATEST and pagination batch size for ALL.

order_by_column.description: Column to use for LATEST sampling mode in tabular sources (usually created_at/updated_at). Auto-detected when not set.

fallback_to_random.description: Tabular sources only. Fallback to RANDOM ordering when LATEST mode cannot resolve an ordering column.

include_column_names.description: Tabular sources only. Include column names in sampled detector payload rows.

rows_per_page.description: Tabular sources only. Number of rows per sample (AUTOMATIC/RANDOM/LATEST) or per pagination batch (ALL). For AUTOMATIC this is the size of the incremental slice ingested each run. Controls memory usage during large table scans.

ResourceOverrides.title: ResourceOverrides
ResourceOverrides.description: Override K8s job resources and timeout for this source.

max_pool_workers.description: Max OS processes in the detector pool. Auto-sized from CPU/memory limits when omitted.

max_concurrent_assets.description: Max assets processed concurrently. Controls parallel DB connections. Defaults to pool_workers * 2 when omitted.

Detectors.description: Detectors to run on ingested content

CustomDetectorSelections.description: Reusable custom detector IDs selected from the custom detector catalog.

url.description: Base URL of the WordPress site (e.g., https://example.com)

username.description: Username for authentication (optional for public content)

WordPressOptionalContent.title: WordPressOptionalContent
WordPressOptionalContent.description: Content scope and filters for WordPress ingestion.

post_status.description: Post status filters (requires authentication for non-public statuses)

username.description: Mailbox login (usually the full email address)

password.description: Account or app-specific password (use an app password for Gmail/Outlook)

use_ssl.description: Connect over implicit TLS (IMAPS). Disable only for STARTTLS/plain servers.

EmailOptionalScope.title: EmailOptionalScope
EmailOptionalScope.description: Which messages and attachments to ingest.

since_date.description: Only fetch messages on/after this date (ISO 8601 date, e.g. 2026-01-01)

before_date.description: Only fetch messages before this date (ISO 8601 date)

include_attachments.description: Emit attachments as separate assets linked to the email

max_attachment_size_bytes.description: Skip downloading attachment bytes above this size (still emits a metadata-only asset). Unset means no limit.

YouTubeRequired.title: YouTubeRequired
YouTubeRequired.description: Provide at least one of channels or video_urls (enforced at runtime).

channels.description: Channel URLs or handles to list videos from (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/@OpenAI or @OpenAI). At least one of channels/video_urls is required.

video_urls.description: Explicit video watch URLs to scan (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ). At least one of channels/video_urls is required.

YouTubeMasked.title: YouTubeMasked
YouTubeMasked.description: Optional credentials. Leave empty for public videos.

cookies.description: Netscape-format cookie file contents, used by yt-dlp to access age-restricted or members-only videos.

languages.description: Preferred caption language codes in priority order (e.g. ["en"]). Empty means accept any available language.

YouTubeOptionalConnection.title: YouTubeOptionalConnection
YouTubeOptionalConnection.description: Network controls for yt-dlp and transcript fetching.

proxy_url.description: Optional HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy URL to mitigate rate-limiting when scanning at scale.

request_timeout_seconds.description: Socket timeout for yt-dlp network operations.

ignore_errors.description: Continue past individual videos that fail to extract instead of aborting the run.

workspace.description: Slack workspace name or domain (for display and stable IDs)

channel_types.description: Slack conversation types to include when listing channels

channel_ids.description: Explicit channel IDs to scan. If provided, channel_types is ignored.

SlackOptionalTimeRange.title: SlackOptionalTimeRange
SlackOptionalTimeRange.description: Time window filters for message ingestion.

oldest.description: Start of date range (Slack timestamp or ISO 8601)

latest.description: End of date range (Slack timestamp or ISO 8601)

SlackOptionalIngestion.title: SlackOptionalIngestion
SlackOptionalIngestion.description: Throughput and payload controls for Slack ingestion.

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Delay between API calls to avoid rate limits

include_thread_replies.description: Include thread replies in fetched content for detectors

prefix.description: Object key prefix filter (for example, exports/2026/)

include_empty_objects.description: Include zero-byte objects in extraction results

include_object_metadata.description: Attach provider metadata (etag, size, content-type hints, timestamps) to asset checksums

include_content_preview.description: Download object bytes to infer MIME and extract detector-ready text previews

bucket.description: Bucket name for AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Garage, and other S3-compatible endpoints

S3CompatibleStorageMasked.title: S3CompatibleStorageMasked
S3CompatibleStorageMasked.description: Optional static credentials. Leave empty to use ambient AWS credentials chain.

aws_session_token.description: Optional session token for temporary credentials

region_name.description: Region (recommended for AWS; required by some S3-compatible providers)

endpoint_url.description: Custom endpoint URL for MinIO/R2/B2/Garage and other S3-compatible providers

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum objects requested per provider list API call

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per object for MIME detection and text extraction

path.description: Absolute path of the local folder to scan (for example, /Users/jane/Documents)

LocalFolderMasked.title: LocalFolderMasked
LocalFolderMasked.description: Local folder scans run with the desktop application's filesystem permissions; no credentials are required.

follow_symlinks.description: Follow symbolic links while traversing (loops are not detected; leave off unless needed)

include_hidden.description: Include hidden files and dot-directories (names starting with a dot)

max_depth.description: Maximum directory depth below the selected folder (unset scans all levels)

max_file_bytes.description: Maximum bytes read per file for MIME detection and text extraction

account_url.description: Azure Blob account URL (for example, https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net)

AzureBlobStorageMasked.title: AzureBlobStorageMasked
AzureBlobStorageMasked.description: Optional Azure credentials. Leave empty to use managed identity/default credential chain.

azure_connection_string.description: Azure storage connection string (takes precedence over other auth fields)

azure_client_id.description: Azure Entra client ID (service principal auth)

azure_client_secret.description: Azure Entra client secret (service principal auth)

azure_tenant_id.description: Azure Entra tenant ID (service principal auth)

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum blobs requested per list page

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per blob for MIME detection and text extraction

GoogleCloudStorageMasked.title: GoogleCloudStorageMasked
GoogleCloudStorageMasked.description: Optional inline service account credentials JSON. Leave empty to use ADC/workload identity.

gcp_credentials_json.description: Google service account credentials JSON as inline string

project_id.description: Optional GCP project ID override for auth context and bucket listing

gcp_credentials_file.description: Path to Google service account JSON credentials file

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum objects requested per list page

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per object for MIME detection and text extraction

PostgreSQLOptionalScope.title: PostgreSQLOptionalScope
PostgreSQLOptionalScope.description: Database, schema, and table selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all non-template databases visible to this user

maintenance_database.description: Database used for database enumeration when include_all_databases is true

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Accepted forms: schema.table or database.schema.table

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets extracted

MySQLSSLMode.description: SSL/TLS connection mode. DISABLED: no TLS; PREFERRED: TLS when available (default); REQUIRED: mandate TLS without certificate verification; VERIFY_CA: mandate TLS and verify the CA certificate (requires ssl_ca); VERIFY_IDENTITY: mandate TLS, verify CA, and verify server hostname.

ssl_ca.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate for SSL/TLS verification. Paste the full certificate content (-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- ... -----END CERTIFICATE-----). Required when ssl_mode is VERIFY_CA or VERIFY_IDENTITY.

allow_public_key_retrieval.description: Allow automatic RSA public key retrieval from the server for caching_sha2_password authentication (MySQL 8+). Only needed when not using SSL and connecting to MySQL 8 servers using the default authentication plugin.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Accepted forms: table or database.table

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets extracted per database

auth_mode.description: Authentication mode. CUSTOM uses masked.username as-is, LDAP prefixes username with ldap_domain when provided.

ldap_domain.description: Optional LDAP/AD domain for LDAP auth mode (for example, CORP or corp.local).

is_aws_rds.description: Set true for AWS RDS SQL Server, false for on-prem. If unset, runtime auto-detects using host patterns.

MSSQLOptionalExtraction.title: MSSQLOptionalExtraction
MSSQLOptionalExtraction.description: Lineage and advanced metadata extraction controls for SQL Server.

include_table_lineage.description: Include table-level lineage links using foreign key metadata.

include_view_lineage.description: Include view-to-table/view lineage links using SQL Server dependency metadata.

include_view_column_lineage.description: Enable view column lineage extraction when available.

include_stored_procedures_code.description: Include stored procedure source code metadata when available.

include_jobs.description: Include SQL Server Agent jobs metadata extraction.

include_query_lineage.description: Enable query-based lineage extraction from Query Store/DMVs.

max_queries_to_extract.description: Maximum number of queries to analyze for query-based lineage.

min_query_calls.description: Minimum execution count for queries to be included in query-based lineage.

query_exclude_patterns.description: SQL LIKE patterns used to exclude queries from query-based lineage.

include_usage_statistics.description: Enable usage statistics extraction from SQL query metadata.

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table/view assets extracted

Databricks SQL warehouse ID used for sampling queries

Snowflake account identifier (for example, xy12345.us-east-2.aws or LMAUONV-ONE_DATA_DEV)

SnowflakeOptionalScope.title: SnowflakeOptionalScope

SnowflakeOptionalExtraction.title: SnowflakeOptionalExtraction
SnowflakeOptionalExtraction.description: Lineage extraction controls for Snowflake metadata ingestion.

include_table_lineage.description: Include table-level lineage links when dependency metadata is accessible.

include_view_lineage.description: Include view-to-table/view lineage links when dependency metadata is accessible.

cluster_host.description: Atlas SRV cluster host or full mongodb+srv:// URI (for example, cluster.abc123.mongodb.net or mongodb+srv://cluster.abc123.mongodb.net). If a full URI is supplied, the host is extracted and credentials are discarded — set them in masked fields instead.

MongoDBMaskedNone.title: MongoDBMaskedNone
MongoDBMaskedNone.description: Use when the MongoDB endpoint allows anonymous/no-auth access.

MongoDBOptionalConnection.title: MongoDBOptionalConnection
MongoDBOptionalConnection.description: MongoDB connection and authentication tuning options.

app_name.description: MongoDB appName (Atlas and driver telemetry label)

tls.description: Enable TLS for on-prem connections when required

replica_set.description: Replica set name for on-prem deployments

direct_connection.description: Connect directly to a single host instead of topology discovery

MongoDBOptionalScope.title: MongoDBOptionalScope
MongoDBOptionalScope.description: MongoDB database and collection selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_collections.description: Optional collection allowlist. Accepted forms: collection or database.collection

exclude_collections.description: Optional collection denylist. Accepted forms: collection or database.collection

PowerBIOptionalConnection.description: PowerBI API endpoint and timeout controls.

PowerBIOptionalScope.title: PowerBIOptionalScope
PowerBIOptionalScope.description: Workspace scope controls for PowerBI ingestion.

workspace_ids.description: Optional allowlist of workspace IDs to scan

workspace_names.description: Optional allowlist of workspace names to scan

PowerBIOptionalExtraction.title: PowerBIOptionalExtraction
PowerBIOptionalExtraction.description: Feature flags that control PowerBI entities to extract.

extract_workspaces_to_containers.description: Emit workspace metadata suitable for container grouping

extract_datasets_to_containers.description: Emit dataset metadata suitable for container grouping

extract_dataset_schema.description: Attempt to extract PowerBI dataset table schema metadata

site.description: Tableau site content URL. Use empty string for the Default site on Tableau Server.
Tableau site content URL. Use empty string for the Default site on Tableau Server.

TableauOptionalConnection.title: TableauOptionalConnection
TableauOptionalConnection.description: Tableau API connection and retry settings.

max_retries.description: Maximum retries for transient Tableau API request failures

ssl_verify.description: Verify SSL certificates. Provide a PEM bundle path string for custom certs.

session_trust_env.description: When true, allow requests session proxy/environment settings

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for Tableau requests

ingest_tags.description: Extract Tableau tags into asset metadata

ingest_owner.description: Extract Tableau owner metadata into assets

extract_usage_stats.description: Extract Tableau usage statistics when accessible

Neo4jRequired.title: Neo4jRequired
Neo4jRequired.description: Neo4j connection endpoint. Accepts bolt://, neo4j://, or neo4j+s:// URIs.

uri.description: Bolt or Neo4j URI (e.g. bolt://localhost:7687 or neo4j+s://abc123.databases.neo4j.io)

database.description: Target database name (defaults to "neo4j"). Multi-database requires Neo4j 4.0+.

max_connection_pool_size.description: Maximum number of connections in the driver pool.

encrypted.description: Force encrypted connection (overrides URI scheme detection).

trust_strategy.description: Certificate trust strategy. TRUST_ALL_CERTIFICATES is useful for self-signed certs in dev.

Neo4jOptionalScope.title: Neo4jOptionalScope
Neo4jOptionalScope.description: Controls which node labels and relationships are included.

include_labels.description: Allowlist of node labels to scan. If empty, all labels are included.

exclude_labels.description: Denylist of node labels to skip (case-sensitive).

node_limit_per_label.description: Maximum number of assets (node labels) to emit per extraction run.

include_relationships.description: When true, relationship edges between labels are resolved and stored as asset links.

base_url.description: Confluence Cloud tenant URL (for example, https://your-domain.atlassian.net)

account_email.description: Atlassian account email used with API token for Basic authentication

api_token.description: Atlassian API token for Confluence Cloud

ConfluenceOptionalConnection.title: ConfluenceOptionalConnection
ConfluenceOptionalConnection.description: HTTP and retry settings for Confluence API calls.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Confluence API calls

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Additional delay between API requests to reduce rate-limit pressure

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API failures and rate limits

ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces.title: ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces
ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces.description: Space-level filters passed to Confluence /spaces endpoint.

labels.description: Filter spaces by labels (comma-separated in API request)

include_footer_comments.description: Include footer comments and aggregate them into a per-page comments asset

include_inline_comments.description: Include inline comments and aggregate them into a per-page comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include Confluence page attachments as related assets

include_linked_file_assets.description: Materialize linked file-like URLs from page body as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction

api_token.description: Atlassian API token for Jira Cloud

JiraOptionalConnection.description: HTTP and retry settings for Jira API calls.

JiraOptionalScope.description: Optional Jira scope filters. When omitted, all visible issues are eligible for sampling.

include_comments.description: Include issue comments and aggregate them into a per-issue comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include issue attachments as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction

ServiceDeskOptionalScope.title: ServiceDeskOptionalScope
ServiceDeskOptionalScope.description: Optional Service Desk scope filters. When omitted, all visible requests are eligible for sampling.

request_status.description: Request status filter passed to Service Desk API

request_ownership.description: Ownership filter values passed to Service Desk API (for example, OWNED_REQUESTS)

organization_id.description: Organization ID used to scope requests

search_term.description: Search term filter for request summaries and content

include_comments.description: Include request comments and aggregate them into a per-request comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include request attachments as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction

database_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the SQLite database file (e.g. /data/app.db)

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Only tables in this list will be scanned.

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets extracted

masked.description: SQLite has no credentials; this section is intentionally empty.

NotionRequired.title: NotionRequired
NotionRequired.description: Notion has no required connection fields; the integration token lives in the masked section.

notion_token.description: Notion API token used as a Bearer credential. Accepts an internal integration secret (ntn_...) or an OAuth public-integration access token.

NotionOptionalConnection.title: NotionOptionalConnection
NotionOptionalConnection.description: HTTP, version, and retry settings for Notion API calls.

notion_version.description: Notion-Version header sent with every request. Defaults to the data-sources API version.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Notion API calls

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Additional delay between API requests to reduce rate-limit pressure

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API failures and rate limits

NotionOptionalScope.title: NotionOptionalScope
NotionOptionalScope.description: Optional Notion scope filters. When omitted, all content shared with the integration is eligible for sampling.

page_ids.description: Restrict extraction to specific page IDs (up to 250)

data_source_ids.description: Restrict extraction to specific data source IDs (up to 250)

search_query.description: Optional full-text query passed to the Notion search endpoint to narrow discovery

include_comments.description: Include page and block comments and aggregate them into a per-page comments asset

include_files.description: Materialize files from file/image/pdf/video blocks, file properties, and page icon/cover as related assets

include_linked_pages.description: Wire parent, relation, and mention references between pages into the asset links graph

include_data_sources.description: Emit Notion data sources (databases) as assets with their schema and link their row pages

file_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per file for MIME inference and text extraction

KafkaSaslMechanism.title: KafkaSaslMechanism
KafkaSaslMechanism.description: SASL mechanism used when security_protocol is SASL_*

bucket.description: Bucket holding the tables — AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Garage, and other S3-compatible endpoints

DeltaLakeOptionalScope.title: DeltaLakeOptionalScope
DeltaLakeOptionalScope.description: Delta Lake table selection scope within the bucket.

prefix.description: Key prefix to search for Delta Lake tables (e.g. warehouse/). Tables are auto-discovered by their _delta_log/ directory.

table_paths.description: Explicit Delta Lake table root keys or s3:// URIs. When set, auto-discovery under prefix is skipped.

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets

bucket.description: Bucket holding the tables — AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Garage, and other S3-compatible endpoints

KafkaOptionalConnection.title: KafkaOptionalConnection
KafkaOptionalConnection.description: Kafka client connection and security options.

ssl_ca.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate for TLS verification (optional for client-certificate auth; validates the broker's certificate)

topic_limit.description: Optional cap on number of topic assets

url.description: Base URL of the cluster (e.g. https://localhost:9200)
Base URL of the cluster (e.g. https://localhost:9200)
Base URL of the cluster (e.g. https://localhost:9200)

api_key.description: API key or bearer token, sent as an Authorization header

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for cluster API calls

index_limit.description: Optional cap on number of index assets

url.description: Base URL of the Meilisearch instance (e.g. http://localhost:7700)
Base URL of the Meilisearch instance (e.g. http://localhost:7700)

MeilisearchMaskedApiKey.title: API Key (Bearer Token)
MeilisearchMaskedApiKey.description: Meilisearch API key or master key, sent as an Authorization: Bearer header. Meilisearch has no separate username/password authentication mode.

index_limit.description: Optional cap on number of index assets

LakehouseStorageConnection.title: LakehouseStorageConnection
LakehouseStorageConnection.description: S3-compatible storage connection options (AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Garage, ...). Mirrors the S3 Compatible Storage source connection settings.

region_name.description: Region (recommended for AWS; required by some S3-compatible providers)

endpoint_url.description: Custom endpoint URL for MinIO/R2/B2/Garage and other S3-compatible providers

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for storage list/read operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum objects requested per provider list API call during table discovery

IcebergOptionalScope.title: IcebergOptionalScope
IcebergOptionalScope.description: Apache Iceberg table selection scope within the bucket.

prefix.description: Key prefix to search for Apache Iceberg tables (e.g. warehouse/). Tables are auto-discovered by their metadata/ directory.

table_paths.description: Explicit Apache Iceberg table root keys or s3:// URIs. When set, auto-discovery under prefix is skipped.

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets

client_id.description: User-assigned managed identity client ID (omit for system-assigned)

certificate_password.description: Passphrase for encrypted PEM private key (optional)

ecosystems.description: Microsoft 365 ecosystems to scan (select one or more)

site_filter.description: SharePoint site hostnames or paths to include (empty = all accessible)

drive_filter.description: Drive names or IDs to include (empty = all)

path_prefix.description: Only scan items under this folder path (e.g. /Documents/Legal)

include_extensions.description: Only include files with these extensions (e.g. .pdf, .docx)

max_object_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this many bytes (default 100 MB)

Microsoft365OptionalConnection.title: Microsoft365OptionalConnection
Microsoft365OptionalConnection.description: Network and throttle controls for Graph API requests.

request_timeout_seconds.description: Socket timeout for Graph API operations

max_retries.description: Maximum retries on transient errors and 429 throttling

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Base delay between requests when throttled (exponential backoff applied)

page_size.description: Items per page for Graph API list requests

Microsoft365OptionalExtraction.title: Microsoft365OptionalExtraction
Microsoft365OptionalExtraction.description: Controls which structural assets to emit beyond files.

delegated_subject.description: User email to impersonate via domain-wide delegation (optional)

service_account_json.description: Full JSON key for the Google service account

drive_ids.description: Shared drive IDs to scan (empty = all accessible shared drives)

folder_ids.description: Only scan these folder IDs recursively (empty = full drives)

include_my_drive.description: Include the authenticated/delegated user's My Drive

include_file_extensions.description: Only include files with these extensions (e.g. .pdf, .docx)

GoogleWorkspaceOptionalConnection.title: GoogleWorkspaceOptionalConnection
GoogleWorkspaceOptionalConnection.description: Network and pagination controls for Drive API requests.

page_size.description: Items per page for Drive API list requests

max_object_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this many bytes (default 100 MB)

timeout_seconds.description: Socket timeout for Drive API operations

GoogleWorkspaceOptionalExtraction.title: GoogleWorkspaceOptionalExtraction
GoogleWorkspaceOptionalExtraction.description: Controls which structural assets to emit and how Google-native files are handled.

export_google_formats.description: Export Google-native files (Docs/Sheets/Slides) to Office formats for content extraction
